title: Complete checkout with shipping information
description: An authenticated customer can review cart items, enter shipping information, and reach the payment completion step.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the shipping information form
Verify the purchase completion screen is displayed

title: Sign in and add a product to the cart from details
description: An authenticated customer can open a product detail page and add the item to their cart.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add the product to the cart
Verify the cart contains the added product

title: Update cart quantities before checkout
description: An authenticated customer can review the cart, change item quantities, and see the totals update before checkout.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the quantity of a cart item
Verify the cart still contains items

title: Register and enter the app
description: A new visitor can create an account with email and password and reach the authenticated area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a valid new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the authenticated area is displayed
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Browse products from the home page
description: A guest shopper can open the home page, browse the product showcase, and reach a product detail page.

steps.description: Verify product showcase content is displayed
Click the link to view a product detail page
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: Sign in with valid credentials
description: An existing user can sign in with email and password and access the authenticated area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated area is displayed

title: Update cart quantity and see totals recalculate
description: An authenticated customer can change an item quantity in the cart and see the updated totals reflect the new quantity.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add the product to the cart
Verify the cart totals are updated

title: Search for a product and open its details
description: A guest shopper can search for a product and open a matching product detail page from the results.

steps.description: Fill in a product search query with a common term
Verify matching search results are displayed
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: View admin dashboard summary
description: An authenticated admin can open the dashboard and see the platform summary content.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard summary is displayed

title: Create a product with details and image
description: An authenticated seller can create a new product and see it appear in their product list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the product details form
Verify the new product appears in the seller product list

title: Search for products and open a result
description: A guest can search for products, review matching results, and open a matching product detail page.

steps.description: Fill in the search field with a relevant product name

title: Edit an existing seller product
description: An authenticated seller can update an existing product and see the changes reflected in their product list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the edit flow for one of the seller's products
Verify the updated product appears in the seller product list

title: Open user management from the admin dashboard
description: An authenticated admin can reach the user management area from the dashboard and review the users list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to manage users
Verify the users management view is displayed

title: Delete a seller product after confirmation
description: An authenticated seller can delete one of their products and see it removed from the list after confirming the action.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose one of the seller's products to delete
Verify the product is removed from the seller product list

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order detail page is displayed

title: Filter the product catalog by category

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: An authenticated customer can remove a cart item and see the cart update to reflect the removal.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add the product to the cart
Remove the item from the cart

title: Handle an empty cart before checkout
description: An authenticated customer can open an empty cart and see an empty state instead of checkout actions.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty cart state is displayed
Verify checkout actions are not available

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A visitor who submits invalid credentials sees a clear login error and remains blocked from signing in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Show an empty search state
description: A guest who searches for a non-matching term sees an empty results state instead of product results.

steps.description: Fill in the search field with a unique nonsense term
Verify an empty state message is visible
